channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Fender Kingman Acoustic Bass V2 2022 - Black — $473.90
item.description:
$473.90 · Excellent · Greg 's Guitars

Fender 2022 Kingman Bass V2

In excellent condition with very minor play wear and includes Fender Gig Bag

Acoustic Electric

Short scale length 30.3"

Solid Sitka Spruce top with optimized scalloped "X"-bracing, paired with laminated Sapele/Mahogany back and sides.

Newporter Auditorium style with a cutaway for smooth access to the upper frets.

Nato/Mahogany neck carved into a slim "C"-shaped Jazz Bass profile with a satin urethane finish

Walnut fingerboard featuring retro pearloid block inlays and a 12" radius.

Side-mounted Fishman Presys Plus preamp system with a built-in electronic tuner, 3-band EQ, notch filter, phase switch, and brilliance control

Graph Tech NuBone nut and saddle, open-back geared tuning machines, and a Modern Viking bridge

item.title: 【used】Aria Pro II / TAB-Classic/FM BS 3.700kg #41020155103【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $702
item.description:
$702 · Very Good · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Aria Pro II is an international brand that has been active since the early days of guitar making in Japan.


As a brand of Arai Trading, a large trading company, it excels at combining high quality with accessible pricing.


This is a TAB bass guitar with a semi-acoustic construction.


The body top is Flamed Maple, and the body sides and back are Maple.


The fingerboard is Rosewood.


The pickups are original.


It features a compact body that is easy to hold and a long scale length, making it easy to handle even for those who usually play Fender-style guitars.


The semi-acoustic construction produces a rich, warm sound with a sense of airiness.


The frets have approximately 80% remaining.


The truss rod is in good condition.


The neck is in good condition.


The body and paintwork are generally clean, although there are some minor scratches on the back of the body.


The electronics are in good condition.

No obvious modifications were observed.


Controls: Master Volume, Master Tone, Pickup Selector

Nut Width: 40.0mm

Bridge String Spacing: 18.0mm

Scale Length: 34 Inch

Year of Manufacture: Unknown

Country of Manufacture: China


During setup, we use our original GIB BASIC / Standard Bass Strings.


These strings are characterized by their straightforward sound and stable playability, naturally bringing out the instrument's inherent character.


These are highly reliable strings that we actually use in our repair and setup workshops.


Please enjoy these strings, which aim to be a new standard for bassists.


They are delivered after being adjusted for easy playability by GIB's craftsmen.


Accessories: Soft case (ARIA PB-EB)


Text: Tomoki Hayakawa


Inspection 담당: Oshima


Product Photos: Tei


GIB 3-Month Warranty Included


●Trade-in available for up to 15% OFF


When purchasing, using our trade-in service will give you a 10% discount on the sales price. (Consignment items are excluded. Applicable only if the trade-in value is 15% or more of the sales price.)


Furthermore, if you trade in an instrument eligible for our monthly buyback campaign, the discount rate will be 15%.


<a href='' target='_blank'>


<img src='' alt='Click here for details on trade-in purchases'>

</a>

◯GIB, TONIQ Warranty Information


●Lifetime Free Maintenance


Instruments purchased from our store are eligible for lifetime free ""String Vibration Setup"" (normally ¥4,400). (Reservation required)


・Please present your warranty card with your name filled in.


・This warranty is only valid for the person who purchased the instrument at a GIB or TONIQ physical store or online shop.


・Please bear the cost of shipping and other miscellaneous expenses.



● Guaranteed Buyback Price


If you sell your purchased item within 6 months of purchase, we guarantee a buyback price. The price is 50% for new items and 70% for used items.


● Warranty Against Defects


Basic Co., Ltd. provides a warranty against defects for products sold by the company. Excluding some items such as consigned goods, we will repair (or refund if repair is not possible) any malfunctions that occur during normal use within a certain warranty period from the date of purchase free of charge.


The warranty period is 3 months for used items and 1 year for new items.


Please note that the following cases will incur a charge even within the warranty period:


* Malfunctions and damage caused by transportation, movement, dropping, etc.


* Replacement of consumables.


* Malfunctions and damage caused by fire, earthquake, salt damage, gas damage, or abnormal voltage.


* Malfunctions and damage caused by handling contrary to the precautions described in the instruction manual.


* Malfunctions or damage to parts repaired or modified by parties other than our company.


* If the warranty card does not have your name, model name, serial number, etc. filled in. Or, if the text has been altered.


* If the warranty certificate is not presented or is lost.


(Warranty is only valid for purchases made within Japan.)


We ship with sufficient packaging.


We also ship internationally.



●Price includes VAT & Duties & Shipping Fee

Free Shipping Worldwide. All import duties and taxes are included in the price. There are no hidden fees upon delivery.


If you return a product, you will be responsible for all shipping and customs fees.


Note: All electronic devices, such as effect pedals and amplifiers, are set for use in Japan.

Please be sure to check the voltage and power specifications of your country before purchasing and using

item.title: Spector Legend 6 Classic Black Cherry 6-String Electric Bass — $913.51
item.description:
$913.51 · Excellent · Sell Us Your Guitar

Here for sale we have a Spector Legend 6 Classic 6-String Electric Bass in Black Cherry finish. Made in Korea, this bass consists of a Mahogany body with a Flamed Maple top, a Maple neck, and a 24-fret Rosewood fingerboard. Other appointments include a Deluxe cast bridge, Black hardware, and Die-cast sealed tuners. The pickups installed are a set of EMG HZ Humbuckers that are wired to two volume controls, and a 2-band EQ. 


The Maple neck plays extremely well with its Thin ‘D’ shaped profile making fretting easy across all 6 strings. The Satin finish to the rear assists with easy fluidity of the 35” scale. The Rosewood fingerboard is luxurious under the fingers, offering a smooth and durable playing surface across the register. The 16" radius is highly practical for a wide range of playing styles and techniques offering the player a varied and enjoyable playing experience.


The EMG HZ pickups have a well rounded tone, with a solid and commanding low end, a tight and punchy midrange, along with clear and cutting highs. The active controls offer a plethora of tonal options, allowing you to take full control of your sound with a 2-band active EQ, great for sculpting out the perfect tone for any playing situation. Overall a really solid workhorse bass with a lovely modern feel! 


Brand- Spector

Model- Legend 6 Classic

Finish- Black Cherry

Made In- Korea

Top- Flame Maple

Body- Mahogany

Neck- Maple

Neck Profile- 'D'

Fingerboard- Rosewood

Fingerboard Radius- 16"

Frets- 24

Scale Length- 35"

Nut Width- 2.139"

Pickups- 2x EMG HZ Humbuckers

Controls- 2x Volume, 2-band Active Tone Control


Luthier Report


Our ID: 1110526207491

Weight: 10.9lbs  

Serial: 4065


Aesthetic Condition:

Headstock: Overall very good condition. The front face demonstrates light scratching, only visible under direct light and close scrutiny. The top edge demonstrates light scuff marks, most notably a blue mark to the bass side, which could not be removed during our cleaning process.

Neck: Overall very good condition. The rear of the neck demonstrates light indentations throughout, most notably in line with the treble side of the 11th fret. These can be felt by the fingertip on inspection but not by the hand in playing position. Any markings to the fingerboard are difficult to discern.

Body: Overall very good condition. All aspects of the body demonstrate light scratching, scuffing and indentations. Most notably indentations beneath the control knobs and scuffing to the lower bout edges. Similar scuffs and indentations are apparent to the bass side of the rear face lower bout, and near the neck bolts. None of these markings have removed the finish to reveal the wood beneath.


Condition of Frets:

The frets demonstrate mild signs of use, with light denting in the early register, not affecting playability. There is considerable material remaining for any fret work the new owner may wish to perform.


Current Set Up:

Truss Rod: Fully functional. Truss rod tool (5mm hex) is included.

Hardware: Fully functional and very good condition. Very light scratching is apparent to the control knobs.

Structural: No concerns or issues to note.

Height of the string from the 12th Fret-2.25mm - Bass 2.75mm

Please be aware that the action on a guitar may move slightly in transit and this measurement is the current height.

Strings on Guitar - 45-100


Electrics: Fully functional.


Case & Accessories

Hiscox Liteflite Hard Case

Overall very good condition. All aspects of the case demonstrate light signs of previous use. 


Please be aware that for international buyers import fees are not included in our postage and packaging cost, this only covers the cost of the guitar being sent to you. Import fees will be charged by Customs upon the guitar's arrival in the recipient country. Due to Brexit, this also applies to EU buyers. We advise checking the total import cost with Customs as this is not information we are able to accurately provide.

item.title: Gibson Les Paul Triumph Bass 1971 - 1979 (Walnut) — $3,817.96
item.description:
$3,817.96 · Very Good · Mr's Fjaka's Gear Locker

This 1973 Gibson Les Paul Triumph Bass is a stunning example of Gibson's innovative approach to bass design in the early '70s. Built with the iconic Les Paul body shape, this bass features a solid mahogany body and set mahogany neck, delivering a warm, punchy tone with incredible sustain. The natural finish highlights the beautiful grain of the mahogany, giving this bass a timeless and elegant look.

The dual low-impedance pickups are the centerpiece of the Triumph Bass’s design, offering exceptional tonal versatility. With its unique switching and tone-shaping options, including a three-way toggle switch and varitone-style rotary selector, this bass is capable of producing everything from deep, thumping lows to articulate mids and sparkling highs. It’s a true studio and stage workhorse with endless tonal possibilities.

The rosewood fretboard features pearl dot inlays, providing a smooth and comfortable playing experience, while the short scale length adds to the bass's warm and focused sound.

For players and collectors alike, this Les Paul Triumph Bass is a rare piece of Gibson history with a unique voice that stands out in any mix.

Case: Comes with it's original hard case.
Amount of fretwear: Approx 10%
Any questions, don’t hesitate to ask.

item.title: J&A Neo 2026 - polymat — $3,638.99
item.description:
$3,638.99 · Excellent · Joseph bass

32" headless 24 frets 16" radius


Neck throu body wenge padauk maple neck with Ebony fretboard

Mahagony body wings Poplar burl top

Ultra thin neck for fast playing,very comfortable.

21mm thick at 1 fret

23mm at 12 fret

String spacing 18mm

Steel strings 130 100 80 60 40 20

Emg Dcx pickups

Emg preamp

Sound of bass is great, with lots of hi mids and attack.

Low b is great, evry fret is note, not muddy tone without defintion.

Great sounding bass and ergonmics.

Great for all style of playing.

Weight 4 kg.

Shiped with bag.

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man Big Al — $2,700
item.description:
$2,700 · Excellent · Matt's Shop

Beautiful Music Man Big Al bass. Excellent shape, body and neck in fantastic condition. Frets show just slight wear, plays and sounds outstanding.

4 Band active EQ, with passive treble roll off.

Switching options for any combination of pickups, including middle and bridge together in series or parallel. Hum canceling in all positions

Fresh DR FatBeams 45-105 strings

Weighs 9.2 lbs on my scale

Comes with factory hard case
Buyer pays $95 for insured shipping to 48 states only

item.title: 90's IBANEZ SOUNDGEAR BASS - JAPAN - SUPER SLIM NECK - ACTIVE — $559.57
item.description:
$559.57 · Good · Graffiti Music

90's IBANEZ Soundgear Bass - made in JAPAN:

+ ash body finished in wine red, has some laquer chips

+ maple neck with rosewood fingerboard,slim demensions = super easy to play

+ P & J single coil pickups

+ active electronics

+ gold hardware

+ versatile sound -- from FUNK to ROCK !

item.title: MTD 535-21 #10 — $6,360.99
item.description:
$6,360.99 · Good · Kurosawa Music Ikebukuro

-----

*Caution!!

To prevent fraudulent purchases, we do not accept PayPal guest checkout.

Please create your PayPal account before make the payment.

-----

Welcome to

Kurosawa Ikebukuro! We can ship anywhere all over the world!!

Thank you for looking! Feel free to ask for more details. Also, please carefully read our

shop policy below the guitar description!

For Paypal payments, please register your address in your Paypal account in advance.

------------------------------------------

◆＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿ ◆



Founded in 1994, Michael Tobias Design (MTD) has stood alongside the world's most prestigious bass manufacturers and helped define what is now known as the high-end bass. Drawing upon Michael Tobias' extensive expertise in both electric and acoustic instrument building, every MTD bass showcases exceptional craftsmanship. Its signature asymmetric neck profile, created through meticulous hand carving without the use of CNC machining, offers each instrument its own unique character while delivering outstanding playability and ergonomic comfort.

This particular bass is an exceptionally early example of MTD's work, bearing serial number #10, making it one of the brand's earliest instruments.

Built around MTD's classic 35-inch scale with 21 frets, it features an ash body, wenge neck and fingerboard, and the familiar Bartolini pickups paired with the Bartolini NTMB preamp. The result is a deep, powerful sound with remarkable low-end authority. Rather than the more common 24-fret configuration, this 21-fret design offers a distinct tonal character that many players appreciate for its warmth and fullness.

The 51.4mm nut width and 19mm bridge string spacing provide a spacious playing platform. While the dimensions may initially seem substantial, the expertly carved asymmetric neck quickly feels natural in the hands—a testament to MTD's renowned craftsmanship.

Cosmetically, the bass shows honest signs of use, including small dings and surface scratches throughout. However, thanks to the finish color, these marks are generally unobtrusive. Up close, the wear is apparent, but there are no major paint chips or significant blemishes, allowing the instrument to present very well both in photographs and at first glance.

The frets retain plenty of life, and the truss rod functions properly with ample adjustment remaining, making this bass ready for years of continued use.

As one of the defining names in the world of high-end basses, MTD's earliest instruments are especially exciting to encounter. While close inspection reveals a few details that differ from current production models, the essential design philosophy and craftsmanship remain unmistakably MTD. This instrument clearly demonstrates just how refined the company's work was from the very beginning.

An exceptional opportunity to own a piece of MTD history—don't miss it.

Specifications

  • Scale Length: 35"
  • Frets: 21
  • Body: Ash
  • Neck: Wenge
  • Fingerboard: Wenge
  • Pickups: Bartolini
  • Preamp: Bartolini NTMB
  • Nut Width: 51.4mm
  • Bridge String Spacing: 19mm
  • Weight: 3.75kg

Includes: Original Hard Case, 3-Month Store Warranty

Please Note: The actual color of the instrument may vary slightly depending on your display settings and monitor calibration.

---------------------------------------------------------

*Notice-

As this product is being sold in our busy retail stores alongside online stores, there is a possibility that it may be sold out. We will cancel the order if this happens. Please understand we do our best to update stock, but sometimes this situation is unavoidable for a busy retailer.



Customs Tax

International Buyers Please Note: Import duties, taxes, and charges are not included in the item price or shipping cost. These charges are the buyer's responsibility.

Please check with your country's customs office to determine what these additional costs will be prior to bidding or buying.

Customs fees are normally charged by the shipping company or collected when you pick the item up. These fees are not additional shipping charges.

We won't under-value merchandise or mark the item as a gift on customs forms. Doing that is against U.S. and international laws.



Shipping

We only ship to PayPal registered address.

Service: FedEX


Please Note: We won't under-value merchandise or mark the item as a gift on customs forms.　Doing that is against U.S. and international laws.

We only ship to PayPal registered address. Please contact us if you reside in countries in which we do not specify shipping service and cost. Please be aware that delivery could be delayed depending on customs inspection, in case of natural disasters, and other reasons such as postal strikes.


Payment We only Accept PayPal. The item will be shipped within 4 business day after the payment is received. If payment can't be confirmed within 4 days after the close of the auction, a reminder will be sent to you.


Return Policy Returns accepted After receiving the item, contact seller within 14 days. Please see more details on Shipping and payments tab.


Others If you have any problem, please contact us. Your satisfaction is very important to us.


About Authenticity All our items are 100% authentic. We are officially registered as legal business and we have to comply with all rules and　regulations including tax requirements from the Japanese government.


About Us Business hours: 11:00am-8:00pm

T.KUROSAWA & CO.,LTD.

Ikebukuro

1-4-4,higashiikebukuro

toshima-ku,Tokyo,170-0013,Japan


*Notice:


To customers living in the United States:

Recently, there have been numerous reports of products being temporarily detained by U.S. Customs.

You may receive a reminder from the shipping company requesting your cooperation in completing certain paperwork.

In such cases, we apologize for the inconvenience, but you will need to fill out the necessary paperwork and submit it to the shipping company as soon as possible.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: Aria Pro II SB-1000 2026 See through Black — $1,590.25
item.description:
$1,590.25 · Brand New · Kurosawa Music Ikebukuro

-----

*Caution!!

To prevent fraudulent purchases, we do not accept PayPal guest checkout.

Please create your PayPal account before make the payment.

-----

Welcome to

Kurosawa Ikebukuro! We can ship anywhere all over the world!!

Thank you for looking! Feel free to ask for more details. Also, please carefully read our

shop policy below the guitar description!

For Paypal payments, please register your address in your Paypal account in advance.

------------------------------------------

◆＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿ ◆



The legendary Aria Pro II SB Series, trusted by world-renowned bassists such as Marcus Miller, Will Lee, Jack Bruce, and John Taylor, has arrived.

This model features a luxurious ash Super Balanced Body, neck-through construction, and Aria Pro II's proprietary B.B. Circuit.

In recent years, basses built to these specifications have become increasingly rare due to the rising costs of premium tonewoods and hardware. That's why it's always reassuring to see one of these exceptional instruments back in stock.

The Super Balanced Body is uniquely contoured, gradually tapering in thickness from the body end toward the cutaway. This innovative design delivers outstanding balance, dramatically reducing the neck dive that many bassists struggle with, while also producing a rich, punchy sound with enhanced low and mid frequencies.

Designed around the concept of naturally amplifying the pickup signal without compromising its original character, the proprietary B.B. Circuit offers remarkably low noise performance. It features a 6-position Attack Mode Selector (active low-pass filter), allowing you to shape everything from warm, mellow tones to bright, articulate sounds. A dedicated bypass switch is also included, making tone shaping intuitive and versatile.

Its sound blends vintage warmth and earthy character with refined clarity in a way that is truly addictive. It's the kind of bass that inspires you to revisit countless classic recordings the moment you pick it up—a true masterpiece that has rightfully earned its legendary reputation.

Don't miss this opportunity.

Specifications

  • Body: Ash, Super Balanced Body
  • Neck: Maple/Walnut Neck-Through
  • Fingerboard: Ebony
  • Frets: 24
  • Scale Length: 864mm (34")
  • Pickups: MB-1E Dual Coil
  • Controls: Master Volume, Master Tone, 6-Position Pickup Attack Mode Selector, Bypass Switch, Battery LED
  • Machine Heads: GOTOH GB707
  • Nut: Brass
  • Bridge: GOTOH J510BO
  • Hardware: Gold
  • Finish: SBK (See-Through Black)

Includes: Gig Bag, Manufacturer's Warranty

*The color may appear different from the actual product depending on your monitor environment.

---------------------------------------------------------

*Notice-

As this product is being sold in our busy retail stores alongside online stores, there is a possibility that it may be sold out. We will cancel the order if this happens. Please understand we do our best to update stock, but sometimes this situation is unavoidable for a busy retailer.



Customs Tax

International Buyers Please Note: Import duties, taxes, and charges are not included in the item price or shipping cost. These charges are the buyer's responsibility.

Please check with your country's customs office to determine what these additional costs will be prior to bidding or buying.

Customs fees are normally charged by the shipping company or collected when you pick the item up. These fees are not additional shipping charges.

We won't under-value merchandise or mark the item as a gift on customs forms. Doing that is against U.S. and international laws.



Shipping

We only ship to PayPal registered address.

Service: FedEX


Please Note: We won't under-value merchandise or mark the item as a gift on customs forms.　Doing that is against U.S. and international laws.

We only ship to PayPal registered address. Please contact us if you reside in countries in which we do not specify shipping service and cost. Please be aware that delivery could be delayed depending on customs inspection, in case of natural disasters, and other reasons such as postal strikes.


Payment We only Accept PayPal. The item will be shipped within 4 business day after the payment is received. If payment can't be confirmed within 4 days after the close of the auction, a reminder will be sent to you.


Return Policy Returns accepted After receiving the item, contact seller within 14 days. Please see more details on Shipping and payments tab.


Others If you have any problem, please contact us. Your satisfaction is very important to us.


About Authenticity All our items are 100% authentic. We are officially registered as legal business and we have to comply with all rules and　regulations including tax requirements from the Japanese government.


About Us Business hours: 11:00am-8:00pm

toshima-ku,Tokyo,170-0013,Japan

You may receive a reminder from the shipping company requesting your cooperation in completing certain paperwork.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: Ibanez SR705 5 string Bass 2008 - Transparent Black — $590.27
item.description:
$590.27 · Good · CW bass sales

Ibanez SR705 SoundGear 5 string Bass

Made in Indonesia 2008.

Mahogany body with Figured Maple top finished in translucent black with an amazing jatoba and bubinga SR5 neck with a 24-fret rosewood fingerboard with abalone oval inlays.

Bartolini MK-1 pickups - Controls are volume, pickup balancer, and Bartolini MK1 3-band EQ with treble, bass, and mid boost/cut. 

Accu-cast B25 fixed bridge with 16.5mm string spacing, die-cast machine heads.

The bass is in really good condition with some light marks from use. It’s very recently had a full service and set up by local luthier ‘the guitar doctor’ and it feels and plays great!


The postage cost includes - 

packaging of the bass in a bass guitar box from Anderson’s Music Co.

Postage in the UK with Parcelforce24 with insurance.

item.title: Fender Deluxe Active Jazz Bass® V 2021 - Olympic White — $1,200
item.description:
$1,200 · Very Good · Clayton's Gear Shop

Includes very nice SKB hard case

item.title: Fender Musicmaster Bass 1977 — $1,199.99
item.description:
$1,199.99 · Good · Vintage , New and Used Gear

Fender Musicmaster Bass 1977 changed pickup. This plays well and sounds great. Listing new items regularly. *** Buyer must contact us within 24 hours and pay for shipping, handling, and insurance. I ship world wide, but please understand shipping cost is for USA . There will be additional costs for international shipping. Please ask all questions if you have any concerns prior to bidding. PLEASE UNDERSTAND THAT IF IT'S NOT IN DESCRIPTION, IT'S NOT INCLUDED. Thanks and please check out my other listings

item.title: SX Vintage Series Bass Guitar — $250
item.description:
$250 · Excellent · Ed Moon's Gear Head Heaven

This SX Vintage Series Bass Guitar is part of a large collection of instruments and music equipment that belonged to my father, Ed Moon—a musician, educator, craftsman, and luthier. It comes with the following included accessories: Bass Guitar Stand Included. Please review the photos closely for the item’s overall cosmetic condition, included accessories, and any visible signs of use. We are currently cataloging hundreds of instruments and pieces of equipment from his collection, so we have not been able to fully test every item. This piece is being offered as-is based on the condition shown and the information available to us. That said, we are happy to perform reasonable testing or answer specific questions for seriously interested buyers whenever possible. Please feel free to reach out before purchasing if there is a particular function, connection, control, or detail you would like us to check. Inventory ID: EMGHH-282

item.title: Squier Affinity Precision Bass 1999 - 2012 Black — $110
item.description:
$110 · Fair · JD's Music Resale

Rescued from a basement after 20 years. New electronics with alnico pickups. Professional neck, nut, and fret adjustment.

Road worn, some cracks in the body that filled with water glue by luthier.

She's rough, but she sounds punchy and clean.

item.title: 1973 Fender USA Vintage Jazz Bass Pickup 7.34K — $275
item.description:
$275 · Very Good · JJ's Gear Garage

1973 Fender USA Vintage Jazz Bass Pickup in very good condition with a reading at 7.34K. Grey Bottom with original cover, staggered polepieces and flat head screws. Works, and sounds like it should, ready for your vintage restoration or project. Only has one wire soldered on, needs the other added. Will be packed well, fully insured. PLEASE ASK ANY QUESTIONS BEFORE BUYING OR MAKING AN OFFER.

48 STATES ONLY, NO OVERSEAS

item.title: SIRE JAZZ BASS PREAMP SOLDERLESS BRAND NEW — $149
item.description:
$149 · Excellent · Retrovoice

Brand new jazz bass preamp with vintage passive tone control and bass, midrange and treble controls. This has a plate mounted output jack, so NO need for a side mounted bass body output jack. These sound incredible-super low noise and infinite tone shaping possibilities. Also has active/passive toggle switch for use with no battery. This preamp opens up a world of possibilities and offers more tone shaping than most of the preamps on the market. This is a solderless version that allows you to make all the connections with just bare wires to the screw terminals. It runs on either a single 9 volt battery with the prewired battery connector, or can be rewired for any anything in between 9 and 18 volts, so one or two nine volt batteries, or a single miniature 12 volt (size 23A) battery will work. A 23A battery will fit in most cavities if a 9 volt battery is too large. Includes wiring diagram. Please note the glare in the photo of the control panel is from the removable clear protective film on it.

item.title: 🎸Acoustic Electric Bass Guitar with a Rosewood Fretboard +Soft Case/Gig Bag +Strap +Cable +Picks!🎸 — $175
item.description:
$175 · Brand New · Leo Blacks Music Shack

****I accept 100% of ALL refund requests plus return shipping!****

Hi! I’m Leo Black, owner of “Leo Black’s Music Shack” and whether you're playing alone, with friends, family, at church, or on stage, you'll always sound AND look good with this beauty!

She’s a jet black acoustic-electric (Or acoustoelectric, depending on your background) bass guitar and yes, she sounds AND plays as good as she looks! I bought one for myself last year expecting a big toy that would last a few months if I was lucky, but I'm still playing her! She's amazing! The action was perfect right out of the box, the electric pickup sends a crystal clear signal to any amp or PA, and the fretboard is the same material used on Made in America Fenders! O.O

Yeah. She's awesome. And she's also available in natural or blue. Just ask for pictures! :)

My story: I've been selling guitars and guitar accessories to support local musicians with my live music production company (ICVMproductions) for over 6 years until COVID shut us down. Now, in an effort to earn the funds needed to keep the music alive, we’re opening our on-line store, “Leo Black’s Music Shack & Guitar Emporium.”

Thanks for checking out my ad, and, If you have any questions, please don’t hesitate to ask! :)

~ Leo

****I accept 100% of ALL refund requests plus return shipping!****

For more colors and styles check out our website!

item.title: 2017 Godin Dorchester 4 Bass Cherry Burst — $550
item.description:
$550 · Very Good · Oakland Guitars

Hello!

Up for grabs is a KILLER Godin Dorchester 4 that is in SUPER mint condition. Very clean and very fun to play. This bass is thumpy and punchy. Set up to shop spec.

Come play it!

Oakland Guitars

item.title: Greco PB 500 “Mercury” P Bass 1979 - Seafoam Green Nitro — $999
item.description:
$999 · Good · Trader Nick’s

Built around an original 1979 Greco PB-500 neck from Greco’s renowned “lawsuit era” of Japanese production.


This is a custom/project bass, NOT an all-original instrument. Many parts have been replaced to create a lightweight, vintage-inspired Precision-style bass.


Features:

• Original 1979 Greco PB-600 maple neck

• Refinished in Seafoam Green nitrocellulose lacquer

• New bridge

• New electronics

• Precision-style split-coil pickup

• Super lightweight

• Freshly set up with flatwound strings

• Plays and sounds fantastic


A great choice for someone who appreciates the feel and quality of vintage Japanese instruments but wants the reliability of modern electronics. Comfortable, resonant, and ready to roll.

item.title: PRS Gary Grainger Signature 4-String with Rosewood Fretboard 2013 - Present - Orange Tiger — $3,000
item.description:
$3,000 · Excellent · Tj’s Used Sh1t

Up for sale is my 2013 prs Grainger 4. I got this bass on a trade a few years ago and absolutely love it. It’s an amazing bass that plays very well. I’m pretty sure it’s the orange tiger finish but I’m nit 100% sure.

I have the case candy but the bird tag is missing.

US shipping only

item.title: Fender Standard Precision Bass w/ Mojotone 70s pickup & soft case — $650
item.description:
$650 · Good · Stuff from North Dakota

Up for grabs is a massive-sounding 2000s Made in Mexico Fender Precision Bass in black. I believe the body is alder and the neck is maple. This guitar has seen basement and bar shows and lived in a crawlspace in Illinois for a few years but was rescued by me around 2022, brought to a luthier for set-up that same year, and lived in a pet-free/smoke-free studio since.

I’ve installed a Mojotone 70s Clone P-bass pickup that is dead quiet when not playing and packs a ton of punch when you do. I’ve included the original pickup and mounting equipment if you ever want to go back but I think the new pickup sounds all around better. Otherwise, the hardware is all original. Play-wise, check the photos for action and know that, like all used instruments, this bass could use a set-up to your tastes.

Condition-wise, the bass is in good shape and was never abused. The most notable blemishes is the pickguard has a slight wave to it over the years but is purely cosmetic and not noticeable from distance; there are minor impressions in the back of the neck and one spot on the edge of the fretboard that doesn’t impede play at all; there is a small chip and scrape on one side; the tuning machine paddles have a little patina on them. Check the photos carefully, but it truly looks and sounds good.

Listing also includes a nice Roadrunner padded soft case that comfortably holds the bass.

CONUS only - free shipping - no returns - thanks for looking

item.title: 2023 TEAMBUILT WARWICK THUMB BASS IN PRISTINE CONDITION - MADE IN GERMANY — $2,409.67
item.description:
$2,409.67 · Excellent · Andy's Vintage Guitars

Immaculate condition for this 2023 Teambuilt Warwick Thumb, made in Germany and with the original bag, certificate signed by the Hans-Peter Wilfer and Warwick tool box.

This bass comes from the original owner and only had a few hours of use.

very light, sitting at 4.1 kg.

Wenge fretboard, ovangkol body and neck.

item.title: Fender American Performer Mustang Bass 2023 — $1,025
item.description:
$1,025 · Excellent · Wunderlick Guitars

This American Performer Bass from Fender is in like new condition! Set up by my local music techs with 40-95 Ernie Ball flatwound strings. I took a lot of photos to show that it is free of scratches or dents.

Please note that I purchased the parts from the Stratosphere and had my local music shop techs set up the guitar (that's why the serial # on the certificate for the body and the neck serial # do not match). However, this is not a partscaster. All parts are from the American Performer Bass model.

Ships in the padded gig bag depicted.

item.title: 1973 Fender USA Vintage Jazz Bass Neck 4 Bolt — $500
item.description:
$500 · Fair · JJ's Gear Garage

1973 Fender USA Vintage Jazz Bass Neck 4 Bolt In fair condition. This is the real deal, Maple neck with black block inlays. As you can see the previous owner, for some reason sanded the neck down. It is very smooth with no gloss left. The logo was sanded off, along with the neck date. No idea why this was done. For some reason there a hole drilled in the headstock, but not through. Truss rod works like it should, neck is straight. Frets are low, and need to be shined up, but good. There is some extra holes where the tuners go. This is a project for someone, but all the markings are in the right place, ready for a vintage project or restoration. Will be packed well, fully insured. PLEASE ASK ANY QUESTIONS BEFORE BUYING OR MAKING AN OFFER.

48 STATES ONLY, NO OVERSEAS

item.title: Squier Vintage Modified Bass VI 2013-2018 - Olympic White — $700
item.description:
$700 · Excellent · Drums N Strings

Squire Vintage Modified Bass VI in rare Olympic White. Weighs 9 lbs. Strung with LaBella flat wounds. This one comes with a very cool mint pickguard. Plays and sounds great. Minor wear here and there but nothing that shows up well in photos or affects playability. I'm offering free shipping insured and signature required. Offers are considered but I don't see another.... anywhere.

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe '50s Precision Bass 2020 - 2-Color Sunburst with Gig Bag — $374
item.description:
$374 · Very Good · Arizona Guitars and Gear LLC

This Bass is in very good condition. It has been tested, detailed and it's ready to play! It has a couple of minor scratches on the back and under one of the strings. None which affect playability.

The Squier Classic Vibe '50s Precision Bass is a highly regarded, vintage-inspired 4-string bass that faithfully recreates the look, feel, and massive tone of the early 1950s Fender P-Bass. It is known for delivering exceptional value and playability for both beginners and gigging pros.

Key features and specifications include:

  • Body & Finish: Crafted from a resonant pine body (often visible beneath the translucent White Blonde or 2-Color Sunburst finishes) and finished in a slick, gloss polyurethane. [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
  • Electronics: Powered by a single Fender-Designed alnico single-coil pickup, which delivers deep, punchy, and aggressive tones reminiscent of the original '50s era. It also features standard passive Master Volume and Master Tone controls. [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
  • Neck: Features a comfortable, slim "C"-shaped maple neck with a vintage-tint gloss finish, a 9.5"-radius maple fingerboard, and modern narrow-tall frets. It is also equipped with a real bone nut for improved tuning stability. [1, 2]
  • Hardware: Outfitted with vintage-style tuners and a 4-saddle vintage-style bridge utilizing threaded saddles for accurate intonation. [1, 2, 3, 4]
  • Aesthetics: Complete with classic '50s-style headstock markings and knurled flat-top control knobs. [1]

The single-coil pickup setup provides a raw, focused midrange that sets it apart from the thicker, split-coil sound of later P-Basses, making it an excellent choice for country, rock, blues, and soul.

item.title: Spector Euro 5 CST 2026 - Natural Red Burst Gloss — $3,799.99
item.description:
$3,799.99 · Brand New · 12th Fret Music

Spector EURO 5 CST 5-String Active Bass - Natural Red Burst Gloss

Solid Body Active 5-String Electric Bass, Double Cut Style Ash Body with Poplar Burl Top, Ebony Fretboard, EMG X Active Pickups

Manufacturer Description: "The Euro CST draws inspiration from our Woodstock, NY-based Custom Shop, introducing all-new tonewoods, electronics, and finish combinations never seen in the Euro Series. Each Euro CST instrument is meticulously crafted using premium materials, featuring a striking, highly figured Poplar Burl top, a resonant European Ash body, and a 3-piece North American Maple neck paired with an Ebony fingerboard adorned with laminated Abalone Crown inlays. These basses are equipped with a lightweight aluminum bridge for precise and reliable intonation. Premium active EMG X Series pickups deliver the exceptional clarity, attack, and silent operation that defines the Spector sound.

Spector is proud to offer the all-new Spector Legacy preamp for the Euro CST range. Developed in collaboration with Darkglass Electronics, this preamp captures the classic ‘Spector growl’ heard on countless iconic recordings with added versatility (Spector)."

Specifications

Body & Construction

Top Wood: European Poplar Burl

Back Wood: European Ash with a slice of Walnut

Finish: High Gloss

Neck

Neck Wood: 3-piece Maple with graphite rods

Fretboard: Ebony

Number of Frets: 24

Inlays: Laminated abalone crowns

Nut Material: Brass

Nut Width: 1.81"

Scale Length: 35"

Pickups & Electronics

Pickups: Active EMG X Series

Pickup Configuration: Reverse P / J

Controls: Volume, Blend, Treble Cut/Boost, Bass Cut/Boost

Preamp System: Spector Legacy Preamp by Darkglass

Bass EQ: ±12 dB @ 60 Hz

Treble EQ: ±12 dB @ 1 kHz

Hardware

Hardware Color: Black & Gold

Bridge: Aluminum locking bridge with brass saddles

Tuners: Gotoh GB350

Strings

Strings: D’Addario XL Nickel

Other

Case: Gig Bag

String Spacing: 17 mm

(Includes Black "Spector" Gig Bag)

item.title: 2017 Gretsch G6128B Thunder Jet Electric Bass Black MIJ w/OHSC — $2,195
item.description:
$2,195 · Very Good · Imperial Vintage Guitars

2017 Gretsch G6128B Thunder Jet Electric Bass Black MIJ w/OHSC 

This Item Is Located At IVG Burbank

In Very Good Overall Condition (Please See Photos)

Made In Japan

Single-Cutaway Top-Bound Laminated Maple Body In Gloss Black Finish Shows Playwear Throughout Including Some Cosmetic Marks, Dings And Scratches (As Shown)

Two TV Jones Thunder'TronTM Bass Pickups

Chrome Gretsch Tailpiece

Floating Gretsch Roller Bridge

Three-Way Pickup Selector

Master Tone + Volume

Individual Volume Controls For Each Pickup

Pickguard Is Included, But Not Installed (See Photos)

Mahogany Set Neck With Bound Rosewood Fingerboard

Thumbnail Inlays

22 Jumbo Frets

2x2 Gotoh Tuning Machines

Weight: 8lbs 10oz

Nut Width: 1.48"

Neck Depth At 1st Fret: .83"

Neck Depth At 12th Fret: .97"

Comes As Shown With Original Hardshell Case And Pickguard

A striking blend of vintage Gretsch style and thunderous low-end performance, this 2017 Gretsch G6128B Thunder Jet Bass delivers unmistakable looks and tone in a classic gloss black finish. Crafted in Japan, it features a laminated maple body, mahogany set neck, and a pair of powerful TV Jones Thunder'Tron bass pickups that provide rich, articulate sound with exceptional punch and clarity. Premium appointments including a floating roller bridge, Sperzel tuners, bound rosewood fingerboard with thumbnail inlays, and original hardshell case make this a highly desirable instrument for players and collectors alike.

item.title: Sadowsky MetroExpress Hybrid P/J Bass with Maple Fretboard 2023 - Present Candy Apple Red — $650
item.description:
$650 · Excellent · Brendan's Gear Depot

Professionally set up. Gig bag included

item.title: Moollon J5 - Olympic white — $3,817.96
item.description:
$3,817.96 · Very Good · AVB

Moollon J5, Olympic white with matching headstock. Conditions

-playabillity 10/10

-cosmetic 7-8/10 (depends if you are

Into relic). With waiting list of over 4 years at the moment, here is a chance to skip that line:)

item.title: Hamer Cruise Bass 1995 USA — $1,800
item.description:
$1,800 · Excellent · Dylan’s Gear Exchange

1995 USA Hamer Cruise Bass built in New Hartford, Connecticut.

Finished in Candy Apple Red, this bass remains in excellent condition and includes its original Hamer hard shell case.

Features include:

  • USA construction
  • Maple neck
  • Rosewood fingerboard
  • 2Tek Bridge
  • Original hardware
  • Original electronics
  • Original Hamer hard shell case

It plays exceptionally well and is ready for stage or studio use.

Cosmetically, it is in Excellent condition with only a couple of small blemishes (pictured):

  • Small finish chip near the rear strap button
  • Minor ding on the back of the headstock

Ships securely in the original Hamer hard shell case.

item.title: JD Guitars 2026 Neptune 8-string Mini Bass Antique Denim — $1,299
item.description:
$1,299 · Brand New · JD Guitars

It seems I have yet to run out of ideas for the mini-bass format that has held my attention for the past few years. So ,here’s the 8-string version. Tuned eEaAdDgG. Scale length is 23.125” The body is Ash, finished in a new color,Antique Denim, and capped with a 1/4” drop-top of Spalted Tamarind. The Curley Maple neck has a finished maple fretboard with Mother of Pearl fret-markers and side-dots. The necks’ dual-action truss rod is supported by 2 carbon fiber rods that run the length of the neck. Nut width is 1 5/8”. Fretboard radius is 12”. Body, neck and headstock have binding. Pickup is EMG TBHZ.(passive, no battery required). One Volume, one Tone. Bridge by Leo Quan. Tuners are Gotoh. Octave strings have locking tuners. The design lends itself to playing seated, which helps manage the neck-dive that comes from having 8 tuning machines on the headstock. On a strap, the neck-dive is quite manageable (imo). Hand-carved bone nut. Weighs 7lbs 13oz. Ships with gigbag.

item.title: Warwick Rockbass Corvette $$ 4 - Natural — $800
item.description:
$800 · Excellent · JM Gear Shack

Fantastic condition, plays beautifully. Never gigged or moved outside my home studio. Local pickup or shipping conus

item.title: Glossy Black Encore E4 Blaster Bass Guitar in Excellent Condition — $217.84
item.description:
$217.84 · Excellent · Rich Preloved Gear

Bass and soft case only - the stand in the photos isn’t included.


Encore E4 four-string electric bass in black. It’s hardly been played and has spent most of its time safely stored away, so the condition is very clean overall. Straightforward P-style setup with simple volume and tone controls, making it a good first bass or an inexpensive spare.


Happy to consider sensible offers.

item.title: Warwick German Pro Series GPS Corvette $$ 2022 - Burgundy Red — $2,599
item.description:
$2,599 · Excellent · Michele 's Gear Bazaar

I bought this beautiful bass from Sweetwater new in July 2025. I have played it a handful of times only in the smoke-free house. It is in excellent condition, and has spent most of it's time in it's gig bag. This is why I am selling it. I play a couple other basses way more. It functions 100%. Straight, smooth neck. Adjust a nut intact. An amazing bass to hold and play. It does weigh 10 lbs, but stays nicely with a padded strap. The Warwick Growl...The Sound of Wood!!!

item.title: Fender Squier Classic Vibe Bass IV - Black — $569.99
item.description:
$569.99 · Brand New · Wolf Music Company

Description
The Classic Vibe Bass VI is a faithful tribute to the secret weapon of producers and adventurous players that have dared to explore it since its original production from 1961 to 1975. Tuned an octave lower than a guitar and featuring a vintage-style tremolo, the Bass VI is the perfect companion to accompany any guitar or bass player into uncharted territory. Player-friendly features include a slim, comfortable "C"-shaped neck profile with an easy-playing 9.5"-radius fingerboard and narrow-tall frets, as well as a floating bridge with barrel saddles for solid string stability. This throwback Squier model also features 1960s-inspired headstock markings, rich-looking nickel-plated hardware and a slick vintage-tint gloss neck finish for an old-school vibe.

Features
100% Designed by Fender
Inspired by original Bass VI models
Fender-Designed alnico pickups
Vintage-Tint gloss neck finish
Nickel-Plated hardware

item.title: Aria Pro Ii 5 St Bass Guitar Bourbon Barrel Finish — $579
item.description:
$579 · Brand New · Wire Meets Wood Guitars

Aria Pro II 313-BB Electric Bass

The Aria Pro II 313-BB is all about style, power, and soul. Whether you're laying down smooth grooves or bringing the thunder on stage, this bass is built to make you feel something. Its bourbon barrel-inspired look is unforgettable, and the sound? It hits hard and deep. If you want an instrument that plays as good as it looks, this is the one.

Aria Pro II 313-BB Electric Bass Review

Under the hood, the 313-BB delivers serious tone thanks to its powerful P/J pickup setup. You get punchy lows, crisp highs, and everything in between. The roasted maple neck feels smooth and fast, and the open-pore satin finish not only looks killer but lets the wood breathe for better sound. It's a bass that sounds as bold as it looks—and it plays like a dream.

Aria Pro II 313-BB Electric Bass Features
  • Dark brown body with a unique metal pickguard for a bold look
  • Satin finish makes it feel smooth and helps it sound better
  • Comfortable neck that's easy to adjust anytime
  • Powerful pickups give you tons of sound options
  • Built to handle everything from soul to rock and roll
Aria Pro II 313-BB Electric Bass Specs
  • Available in 4-string and 5-string versions
  • Body made from ash
  • Roasted maple bolt-on neck with rosewood fingerboard
  • 24 frets with 34" scale length
  • Alnico-5 pickups in P/J configuration
  • Wilkinson WOB41 bridge with chrome hardware

item.title: Fender American Vintage '62 Precision Bass 2008 - 3-Tone Sunburst — $1,799
item.description:
$1,799 · Very Good · The Bass Shop

Product details:

This bass would be in excellent condition if there wasn't a 2" just to the right of the volume knob. Overwise, it's in great shape and all aspects of the bass work perfectly with a straight neck and lots of fret life.

WEIGHT:  8 lbs. 6 ozs.    

SERIAL #:  V182497

CONDITION:  Very Good

CASE:  OHSC

item.title: Fender Precision fretless bass olympic white 1971 - olympic white — $7,299
item.description:
$7,299 · Very Good · Galaxy Music Company

Who wants a tasty bass?

This could be the coolest early 70s fretless bass ever in olympic white

Looks to be all original body finish pick up and electronics

Lots of flame on the headstock in the back of the neck really some beautiful wood on a phenomenal playing bass

Includes original case don't miss out on this beauty

item.title: Fender Highway One Precision Bass 2006 - Honey Blonde Transparent — $1,299
item.description:
$1,299 · Very Good · The Bass Shop

Product details:

These are great, U.S. built basses that sell for hundreds less than a typical American Standard Fender. This bass has seen a good bit of playing time, hence the wear, and comes with a hardshell case. 

WEIGHT:  7 lbs.  8 ozs.    

SERIAL #:  Z5049072

DATE:  2006

NUT WIDTH:  1 5/8"    

COLOR:  Honey Blonde Transparent 

BODY/NECK/FINGERBOARD:  Alder/ Maple/ Rosewood Fingerboard  

PICKUPS/ELECTRONICS:  Fender Split Coil Pickups/ Passive Vol., Tone

CONDITION:  Very Good  

CASE:  HSC

item.title: Jackson JS Series JS3 Concert Bass — $229.99
item.description:
$229.99 · Good · Music Manor Lansing MI

Used Jackson JS Series Concert Bass JS3

There are a couple obvious paint chips on on this JS3 that were colored in, one in the upper bout right by the neck and the other in the lower bout near the the jack (both visible in photos). The headstock point has a chip that is revealing wood and is missing a bit of binding.  You'll also find some finish scratches, mostly on the back, but also a small patch on the top near the bridge. It's been used for sure, but still rocks like a Jackson, so turn it up!

Jackson JS Series Concert Bass JS3 models rock seismic sound, style and affordability.

The Jackson JS Series Concert Bass JS3 is a four-string, 34"-scale model featuring a lightweight and resonant poplar body, bolt-on maple neck with graphite reinforcement and a 12"-16" compound radius bound amaranth fingerboard with 24 jumbo frets and pearloid sharkfin inlays.

Dual Jackson high-output humbucking bass pickups create a monstrous low-end growl, while a HiMass™ bridge provides rock-solid stability, improved sustain and bolder tone. Tone can be refined and tweaked with a single volume and blend controls complemented by an active three-band EQ. Loaded with vibe and value, this Concert Bass JS3 is available in Satin Black finishes with black hardware.

Get your hands on the Used Jackson JS Series Concert Bass JS3 today!

Order now to pick up in store today! We also offer quick shipping across the United States! All of our Certified USED and VINTAGE items are functional unless noted otherwise. In addition, our in house technicians test and maintain each individual item. Above all, we guarantee satisfaction here at Music Manor in Lansing, Michigan.

item.title: Fender Hama Okamoto Signature Katana Bass 2021 - Black — $1,200
item.description:
$1,200 · Good · Europa Music

For sale is the Fender Hama Okamoto signature Katana bass. it has a small cosmetic paint chip on the largest horn. Otherwise, in perfect working order. Price is fairly firm, but make an offer.

item.title: Fender/MJT PJ Bass with Geezer Butler EMGs -Super Light Weight — $950
item.description:
$950 · Excellent · Jasper's Bass Shed

I built this bass earlier this year from an MJT lightweight alder body with black nitro and a moderate relic job, mated to a Fender “Precision to Jazz Conversion” neck, EMG Geezer Butler passive PJs, and Hipshot US Ultralight lollipops.
It also has a Wilkinson bridge with brass saddles, a 3-string tree, white Jazz-style knobs, and a red tortoise pickguard.

The MJT body is super light and the nitro paint and relic job look awesome.

The neck is direct from Fender and features a 1.5” Jazz nut width, a modern C profile, pau ferro fingerboard with 12” radius and 20 med-jumbo frets.

Weighs only 7 lbs and 13.6 oz - a real back saver!
It currently has Ernie Ball straplocks installed. Let me know if you want them; otherwise I can install the original standard strap buttons.
Will ship in a new Fender gig bag.
Message me with any questions.

item.title: Fender American Professional II Precision Bass with Rosewood Fretboard 2020 - Present - 3-Color Sunburst — $1,500
item.description:
$1,500 · Excellent · Walter's Gear Garage

This item was purchased directly from fender in 2024, since then it has been gigged with lightly, had 2 professional setups, and has been cleaned prior to shipping.

Includes original case and original paperwork. Offers accepted!

I am a music education student who used to play this bass in a hip hop band.

If you have any questions or concerns please let me know I‘m happy to discuss.

Item has minimal wear from normal use with a pick. Pick guard has light scratches.

I have more photos and can take more to send on request.

This is a quality American made instrument built to last with minimal wear and tear.

It’s my favorite bass neck I’ve ever played on and sounds absolutely beautiful and classic in every way you want a P Bass to be.

Thank you for checking out my listing!

item.title: Fender American Professional Classic Precision Bass 2025 - Present - Faded Sherwood Green Metallic — $1,079
item.description:
$1,079 · Excellent · Jonathan's Shop

Excellent + condition with gig bag, COA and tools. May have light surface scratches. ~8.2lbs

item.title: Rogers SC5 Custom Bass Guitar — $3,499
item.description:
$3,499 · Very Good · BAMonBASS Gear Emporium

Up for grabs is a Rogers Rbass SC5

  • Myrtle Burl Top
  • Ash Body
  • 3pc Maple neck
  • 34” scale
  • Aguilar DCB pickups

item.title: Sterling StingRay Ray34 with Roasted Maple Neck 2018 - Present - Firemist Silver — $535
item.description:
$535 · Excellent · Jason's GAS station

Plays great, just never got into the whole MM thing. Large distinctive dark spot on wood on neck (see pics).

item.title: Ibanez BTB1805 Natural Low Gloss 2017 5-String Electric Bass Guitar — $1,475.67
item.description:
$1,475.67 · Very Good · Sell Us Your Guitar

Here for sale we have an Ibanez BTB1805 5-string Electric Bass guitar in Natural Low Gloss. Made in Indonesia in 2017 this guitar features a neck-thru construction consisting of a 9-piece Wenge/Bubinga/Maple neck with Rosewood fingerboard, Ash wings and Rosewood top and back. Other features include Mono-rail V bridge and Gotoh GB707. A pair of Aguilar DCB pickups are fitted and wired to an Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ, pickup balancer, master volume, EQ bypass switch and 3-way mid-frequency toggle.


The 9-piece Wenge/Bubinga/Maple ‘BTB5’ neck profile allows you to navigate the Rosewood fingerboard with ease, allowing for comfortable reach in all registers and promoting ergonomic thumb positioning. The 35” radius provides a comfortable playing surface and with the 1.85” nut width allows for ease of different techniques such as slap bass or chordal playing. The Low Gloss finish is fantastic for smooth, quick transitions up and down the neck whilst the double cutaway body design allows the player to have unobstructed access to the entire register.


The pair of passive Aguilar DCB pickups installed in this bass work in conjunction with the on-board preamp to deliver an incredibly versatile range of sounds. There is a great fundamental bass tone with the controls at their midpoints, producing a warm and powerful low end, clear mids and sparkling top end that captures the attack of your playing. The rest of the extensive controls provide ample tone-sculpting opportunities, allowing you to craft the perfect sound for almost any musical setting, as well as tweaking whilst playing. Perfect for the contemporary working musician who demands quality and versatility. 


Brand- Ibanez

Model- BTB1805

Finish- Natural Low Gloss

Year- 2017

Made In- Indonesia

Body- Ash wings w/ Rosewood top/back

Neck- 9-piece Wenge/Bubinga/Maple

Neck Profile- BTB5

Fingerboard- Rosewood

Fingerboard Radius- 15.75"

Frets- 24

Scale Legnth- 35"

Nut Width- 1.85"

Pickups- 2x Aguilar DCB bridge

Controls- Global volume / pickup balancer / 3-band EQ (bass/mid/treble) / EQ bypass toggle / 3-way mid-frequency toggle


Luthier Report


Our ID: 1210426203051

Weight: 10.1lbs  

Serial: I161204706 (Now missing partially. Owner advises used a clip on tuner there which appears to have removed a portion of the decal)


Aesthetic Condition:

Headstock: Overall very good condition, the top edge demonstrates several indentations to the top edge which chip the finish, revealing the wood beneath. The front face demonstrates a patch of light indentations toward the bottom bass side corner that do not pierce the finish. The serial and model number decal has worn away, fragments of this have spread across the upper rear face.

Neck: Overall very good condition, the rear of the neck demonstrates light scratching and indentation visible only under direct lighting at certain angles. These can be somewhat discerned beneath the thumb but are somewhat difficult to differentiate from the open pore finish.

Body: Overall very good condition, the front face demonstrates light indentation throughout, most notably to the bass side waist.  A patch of finish has worn away to the bass side of the bridge pickup. The edges of the guitar demonstrate light to moderate indentation, piercing the finish occasionally along the lower bout. All aspects of the body demonstrate light scratching visible only under direct lighting at certain angles.


Condition of Frets:

The frets demonstrate minimal signs of use.


Current Set Up:

Truss Rod: Fully functional. Truss rod tool (4mm hex) not included.

Hardware: Fully functional with light signs of wear.

Structural: No concerns or issues to note.


Height of the string from the 12th Fret-2mm - Bass 2.5mm


Please be aware that the action on a guitar may move slightly in transit and this measurement is the current height.


Strings on Guitar - 45-100

On the E string, when playing in the middle to upper register with a moderate to heavy attack, some string rattle is present.


Electrics: 

Fully functional.


Case & Accessories

Ibanez soft shell case

The case demonstrates light signs of use. 


Please be aware that for international buyers import fees are not included in our postage and packaging cost, this only covers the cost of the guitar being sent to you. Import fees will be charged by Customs upon the guitar's arrival in the recipient country. Due to Brexit, this also applies to EU buyers. We advise checking the total import cost with Customs as this is not information we are able to accurately provide.
